items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 10 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「Bonsai 27B is a full open reasoning model that fits on an iPhone」、「从＂机械应答＂到＂服务伙伴＂:得物高可控智能客服的 Agent 工程实践|AICon 演讲整理」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。

items.insightText: 先快速判断它是否包含可复用方法、架构或工程经验，再决定是否进入日报深读。

items.title: Self-Evolving Agent Harnesses via Gated Semantic Quality-Diversity
items.summary: An LLM agent's real-task performance is shaped as much by the harness around its model as by the frozen model itself: its prompts, injected knowledge, runtime control, and configuration. In deployment the harness is often the only lever available, so improving it automatically i…

items.title: Set-shifting Behavioral Test for Harnessed Agents
items.summary: What happens to an LLM agent's tool choice when the reliable tool silently changes within an ongoing session? We borrow set-shifting from cognitive psychology to study how well agents adapt to hidden reliability shifts. Our benchmark mounts tool-skill libraries with redundancies…
